sql_array: CREATE TABLE phrase_classes (apc_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, phrase VARCHAR(255), mode VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO phrase_classes (phrase, mode) VALUES ('My check', 'adding');
UPDATE phrase_classes SET mode = 'replacing' WHERE phrase = 'My check';
SELECT ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('Paid ads', null, null, null, 'Paid ads env', '', 'dba', 'dba');
